vibe: Trust, Growth, Calm, Wellness, Tactile, Modern self-care

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3 elements. H1 max size text-5xl to text-6xl. Keep line-height tight (leading-none for large text).

body.usage: Use for body copy, paragraphs, small labels. Use loose line-height (leading-relaxed).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for soft, approachable feel.
layout_and_spacing.customer_marketplace_grid: Mode A: Tetris Grid. Asymmetrical layouts for salon discovery. Wide gaps (gap-8, gap-12).
layout_and_spacing.owner_dashboard_grid: Mode B: Control Room Grid. Dense, gap-4 to gap-6. Flat rectangular cards with 1px border. Every pixel utilized.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, labels. Center-align hero text only if it improves visual balance.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header_nav: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px subtle inner border (border-white/40). z-50 fixed or sticky.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-stone-200), no default shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.hero_overlay: Max overlay opacity bg-black/40 or bg-stone-900/30. Gradient overlay preferred over solid blanket to preserve image details.

components.shadcn_customization: Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (dropdowns, calendars, dialogs, forms). Customize borders to border-stone-200, radius to rounded-xl, and focus rings to ring-orange-800/20.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form. Left-aligned labels. Generous padding.
components.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-xl. High contrast. Primary: bg-orange-800 text-white hover:bg-orange-700.
components.cards: Avoid overusing standard Shadcn Card in marketplace view. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for custom overlapping, asymmetrical bento layouts.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. E.g., hover:bg-orange-800 hover:text-white.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform, transition-colors duration-200 ease-out).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure focus states have higher contrast.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight for a premium, friendly look.

hero.description: Warm, inviting salon interior. Use for customer landing page hero.

category_hair.description: Hair stylist cutting hair. Use for services listing or category card.

category_spa.description: Spa/massage wellness. Use for spa services category.

avatar_customer.description: Portrait of a man in natural lighting. Use as placeholder customer or stylist profile.

avatar_stylist.description: Black and white photo of a woman smiling. Use as stylist/owner profile.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-slot-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and Manrope (body) via Google Fonts or Fontshare.
Initialize Shadcn UI and add components: button, input, select, dialog, form, calendar, popover, tabs, table.
Implement two distinct layouts: Customer App (discovery, map, details) and Owner Dashboard (sidebar, stats, calendar).
Customer side should feel generous, exploratory, using asymmetrical 'bento' grids for salon showcases.
Owner side should be dense, data-rich (Control Room grid), prioritizing table clarity and calendar view.
Never use placeholder URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Strictly use the image URLs provided in this file.
Ensure the hero section on the customer landing page has the image visible behind a proper overlay (bg-black/40 or gradient).
